features: MAKE HEALTHY SKIN: These exfoliating gloves helps you remove dead skin and surface impurities, unblock pores and activates blood circulation. Leave your skin smooth, healthy and radiant

3 DISTINCT LEVELS: We provide 3 Levels exfloitants gloves for different skin textures (Light & Moderate & Heavy). Never worry about poor exfoliation again! Come and find the right shower gloves for your skin type
ONE SIZE FITS ALL: Made of Elastic material, fits most hands. Elastic wrist provides a perfect fit to prevent gloves from slipping. Great bath gloves for both women and men
EASY TO CLEAN: Just clean them with water and hang away to dry after each use (Each glove with a hanger loop). High-quality material for you to reuse many times, NOT EASILY DAMAGED OR DEFORMED
PERFECT BATH EXPERIENCE: Suitable for exfoliating the neck, shoulders, feet and more, helps you combat acne, rashes, eczema and etc
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 3 Levels Textures 2 Natural Material Previous page Next page 1 Perfectly Bath Partner 2 Exfoliating Effectively Previous page Next page 1 For Many Body Parts 2 Why Choose Us How to Use 1. Get Wet The Gloves---Put on the gloves and get wet with water. 2. Add Body Wash---Add shower gel to the palm of the glove and lather up. 3. Remove Dead Skin---Gently scrub up and down, get you a smooth and soft skin. 4. Cleaning & Hanging---Rinse your gloves clean and hang them to dry.
